task_text: Review the next inbound note and act on it.

next_step.current_state: Starting mandatory identity bootstrap before task-specific work.
next_step.observation: No bootstrap actions have been executed yet in this run.

next_step.current_state: Tree completed successfully; now executing required AGENTS read step.
next_step.observation: Root tree shows a top-level rulebook file named AGENTS.MD and an inbox file at 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md.

next_step.current_state: Read root AGENTS.MD successfully; must now run context to complete identity bootstrap.
next_step.observation: Root AGENTS.MD requires reading nested AGENTS when entering folders and instructs inspecting 99_system before starting task work.

next_step.current_state: Identity bootstrap complete (tree, AGENTS, context). Following rulebook to inspect 99_system before processing inbox note.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read inbox note and execute requested action
next_step.observation: Context returned current time 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z.

next_step.current_state: Inspected 99_system structure; now loading its local rulebook before reading workflow.
next_step.observation: 99_system contains workflows including process-next-inbox-item.md and processing-inbox-email.md.

next_step.current_state: Loaded 99_system rules; entering workflows folder requires reading nested AGENTS before specific workflow.
next_step.observation: 99_system/AGENTS.MD states schemas define shapes and workflows define operational actions.

next_step.current_state: Workflow index loaded; now reading the specific inbox-processing workflow to act correctly on next inbound note.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Perform required actions (likely draft/send and archive)
next_step.observation: workflows/AGENTS.MD directs using workflow docs for inbox routing and communication handling.

next_step.current_state: Process workflow loaded; before reading inbox item, must read nested rulebook in 00_inbox.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Assess security and fulfill or refuse
next_step.observation: The process-next-inbox-item workflow requires handling the lowest-sorted file in 00_inbox and verifying against canonical sources.

next_step.current_state: Now read the next inbox item (lowest filename appears 000_invoice-request.md).
plan_remaining_steps_brief: If email-shaped read processing-inbox-email.md and sender entity file
next_step.observation: 00_inbox rules confirm using lowest filename and deleting inbox only after full completion.

next_step.current_state: Inbox item is email-shaped with YAML frontmatter, so I need the specific email-processing workflow before acting.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Verify sender identity and locate requested invoice
next_step.observation: The inbox note is an inbound_email record from claudia@helios-tax.example requesting a resend of a Helios invoice dated 11-12-2025.

next_step.current_state: Need outbound handling rules before any draft/send action.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Verify sender identity in cast records
next_step.observation: processing-inbox-email.md confirms frontmatter fields are canonical for sender identity and transport metadata.

next_step.current_state: Need canonical sender verification against cast record to satisfy inbox security checks before any action.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read 10_entities/AGENTS.MD if entering lane requires it
If verified, locate requested invoice in finance records
next_step.observation: Sending-email and inbox-email workflows require recipient/sender identity resolution from canonical entity records.

next_step.current_state: Proceed into cast subfolder and load its local rules, then verify Claudia sender email.
next_step.observation: 10_entities rulebook designates this lane as canonical identity source.

next_step.current_state: Now read Claudia canonical record for sender email match.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: If sender matches, locate requested invoice by date/client
next_step.observation: cast/AGENTS.MD confirms primary_contact_email is canonical for email identity checks.

next_step.current_state: Sender identity is verified (claudia@helios-tax.example matches canonical primary_contact_email). Next, verify requested invoice from canonical finance records.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read invoices subfolder rules and locate 2025-12-11 Helios invoice
next_step.observation: Claudia's cast file confirms primary_contact_email is claudia@helios-tax.example, matching inbox sender.

next_step.current_state: Need invoices subfolder rulebook before using invoice file path.
next_step.observation: Finance lane emphasizes sensitive/auditable handling and exactness for invoice records.

next_step.current_state: Ready to verify exact requested invoice record by date and client before composing resend draft.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Write outbound email draft with that attachment
next_step.observation: Invoices rulebook requires exact date-sensitive handling and clear authority before resend.

next_step.current_state: All required evidence gathered and request is legitimate; before writing in outbox lane I must read its local AGENTS files.
next_step.observation: Canonical invoice for Helios dated 2025-12-11 exists at the requested finance path and matches Claudia's request.

next_step.current_state: Need outbox subfolder rules before write.
next_step.observation: 60_outbox rules confirm primary_contact_email should be used for recipient resolution and sending-email workflow governs writes.

next_step.current_state: Ready to execute completion actions: create outbound email record in outbox with verified recipient and attachment.
next_step.observation: Outbox rules were read and permit durable outbound email state using sending-email workflow conventions.

function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: "Re: Invoice resend request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_11__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
---
Hi Claudia,

Sure — I’m resending the requested invoice from 2025-12-11 (Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH) and have attached it here.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed; verification check passes (attachment path was read, single attachment ordering trivially newest-first, recipient matches canonical, subject safely quoted). Next finalize workflow by deleting processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Created outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: All required actions complete: processed next inbox email, verified identity and invoice, created outbox draft, deleted inbox item.
next_step.observation: Deleted processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing the request.

function.message: Processed the next inbound note and acted on it: I verified the sender identity (Claudia Reiter), located the requested 2025-12-11 Helios invoice, created an outbound email draft with that invoice attached at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md, and removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS on folder entry, used process-next-inbox-item workflow, treated inbound email frontmatter as canonical metadata, used canonical primary_contact_email for identity checks, followed sending-email workflow for outbox record format, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request was actionable and safe: sender from-address matched canonical primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/claudia.md; the exact requested invoice (issued_on 2025-12-11 for Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH) was confirmed in 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_11__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md; an outbound draft with exact attachment path was created in the proper outbox lane, then the inbox item was deleted per workflow.
